历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27826 → 26314 → 26664 → 30664 → 30286. In recent two years, the ranking has shifted backward overall. In 2024, it significantly moved back to 30664, then slightly recovered to 30286 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 30286th place. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing: 158 in 2021, 148 in 2022, 120 in 2023, 122 in 2024, 155 in 2025, and 156 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight increase of 1 student, an expansion of about 0.65%, which has minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it has risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, with steadily enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics (a teacher refused to cooperate with nucleic acid testing). In 2024, reputation turned neutral/mixed (rising admission scores triggered campus disputes). Douyin popularity ranking: 32nd (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.365 million, with relatively high short video exposure. No record of admission gaps. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Hainan University, but its traditional strengths include law, agriculture, marine science, and tourism management. Social popularity for majors like law, computer science, and electronic information remains consistently high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to high social popularity. Civil engineering and architecture continue to be discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 137,000 based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 2,583 (-1.85%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been stable at 425–427 points in recent two years. Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, which has some cross-provincial appeal for candidates from the Southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 30286, a slight expansion of 0.65% in the 2026 plan, continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and a decrease of about 1.85% in Physics Category examinees in this province, competition slightly eases but to a limited extent. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 30283, with a range of 29783–30783.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 30783), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety net and be cautious when selecting Tier 1 majors.
